name: Common
description: The trade tongue of most of the multiverse; nearly everyone speaks it.

name: Dwarvish
description: Full of hard consonants and guttural sounds; carries into runic writing.

name: Elvish
description: Fluid, with subtle intonations and intricate grammar; a beautiful script.

name: Giant
description: The language of giantkind, descended from the Ordning's ancient tongue.

name: Gnomish
description: Known for its technical treatises and catalogs of knowledge.

name: Goblin
description: A harsh tongue spoken across goblinoid warbands.

name: Halfling
description: Rarely written; halflings pass it along orally and keep few secrets in it.

name: Orc
description: A grating language with hard consonants, borrowing the Dwarvish script.

name: Abyssal
description: The chaotic, vile speech of the demons of the Abyss.

name: Celestial
description: The melodic language of the upper planes.

name: Draconic
description: Thought to be one of the oldest languages; used in much arcane writing.

name: Deep Speech
description: An alien tongue of aberrations; impossible for most to speak without practice.

name: Infernal
description: The precise, contractual language of the Nine Hells.

name: Primordial
description: The elemental tongue, with dialects Aquan, Auran, Ignan, and Terran.

name: Sylvan
description: The language of the Feywild and its fey inhabitants.

name: Undercommon
description: The trade language of the Underdark.

name: Druidic
description: The secret language of druids; outsiders cannot learn it. Can leave hidden messages.

name: Thieves' Cant
description: A secret mix of dialect, jargon, and code that lets rogues hide messages in conversation.
